# Pull Request

<!--
Thank you for contributing to the MegaLinter MCP Server!

Please fill out the sections below to help us understand your changes.
-->

## Description

Please include a summary of the changes and which issues this PR resolves. Include motivation and context if relevant.

Fixes #(issue number)

## Type of Change

- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (non-breaking change fixing an issue)
- [ ] ✨ Feature (non-breaking change adding functionality)
- [ ] 📚 Documentation update
- [ ] 🔧 Maintenance / Dependencies
- [ ] ⚠️ Breaking change (fix or feature causing existing functionality to change)

## Testing

Describe the tests you ran and how to reproduce them:

- [ ] Tested locally with `npm run build`
- [ ] Tested locally with `npm run dev`
- [ ] Tested MCP server functionality

## Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the project's style guidelines
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my changes
- [ ] I have commented my code, particularly hard-to-understand areas
- [ ] I have made corresponding changes to the documentation
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings or TypeScript errors
- [ ] I have tested my changes locally
- [ ] New and existing unit tests pass locally with my changes

## Related Links

- [MegaLinter Documentation](https://megalinter.io/)
- [MCP Documentation](https://modelcontextprotocol.io/)
- Related issues or discussions

## Additional Context

Add any other context about the PR here.
